description_long: This house is situated on a sloped plot with a paved driveway leading up to a two-story structure. The exterior features a combination of light brown wooden siding and a white gable roof, with a prominent covered porch supported by columns at the front. The house includes multiple windows of varying sizes, arranged asymmetrically, and a garage or utility door on the side. The property is bordered by a low retaining wall near the driveway entrance, and the landscaping consists of simple grassy terrain. The overall design is practical and suburban, with a focus on functionality and modest decorative elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a white gable roof, wooden siding, a covered porch, and a sloped driveway bordered by a retaining wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, sloped terrain, and the retaining wall at the driveway entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, side windows, and the continuation of the sloped lot.
description_view_3: Opposite front view emphasizing the porch, entry steps, and the full length of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, supported by columns, and a simple main door.
